data.title: Data: Tether and Circle have minted $12 billion in stablecoins in the past month
data.description: According to Lookonchain monitoring, with Tether minting 2 billion USDT on the Ethereum chain, Tether and Circle have minted a total of $12 billion in stablecoins in the past month.

data.title: Fed's Williams: Cutting interest rates to a neutral level would be appropriate
data.description: Fed Chairman Williams said that the Fed's balance sheet reduction is progressing very smoothly and that it would be appropriate to cut interest rates to a neutral level. Overly strict policies that last for too long could endanger employment, and it would be appropriate to cut interest rates over time. (Jinshi)

data.title: On September 4, the US Bitcoin ETF had a net inflow of 2,569 BTC, while the Ethereum ETF had a net outflow of 15,444 ETH.
data.description: According to Lookonchain monitoring, on September 4, 10 US Bitcoin ETFs had a net inflow of 2,569 BTC, of ​​which BlackRock received 2,588 BTC. BlackRock currently holds 750,058 BTC, worth US$82.21 billion; 9 Ethereum ETFs had a net outflow of 15,444 ETH, of which BlackRock received 33,884 ETH. BlackRock currently holds 3,743,379 ETH, worth US$16.13 billion.

data.title: Ethereum PoS Network Sees Increased Validator Activity
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, the Ethereum Proof-of-Stake (PoS) network is experiencing significant validator activity. The current exit queue stands at 789,101 ETH, which is approximately valued at $3.39 billion. The withdrawal delay is reported to be 13 days and 17 hours.

Simultaneously, there is a rise in staking demand from new validators. The entry queue has increased to 936,769 ETH, valued at around $4.025 billion, with a current queue time of 16 days and 6 hours.

data.title: Fed's Williams: Expected to see gradual rate cuts
data.description: Fed's Williams said that if the economy meets my forecast, interest rates are expected to be gradually lowered, monetary policy will be moderately tightened, which is appropriate for the current economy, and inflation is expected to return to the Fed's 2% target in 2027.

data.title: Bedrock: uniBTC and brBTC are now available on Aptos to expand BTCFi
data.description: Bedrock announced on the X platform that uniBTC and brBTC have been launched on Aptos to expand BTCFi. Users can now bridge uniBTC and brBTC from Ethereum or BNB Chain to Aptos.

data.title: Two wallets suspected to belong to the same whale sold 3,690 ETH
data.description: According to Lookonchain monitoring, due to the drop in ETH prices, two wallets (possibly belonging to the same whale) panic-sold 3,690 ETH (US$15.6 million) they had just purchased yesterday, losing US$944,000.

data.title: Fed Board nominee Milan: Not recommending handing over Fed control to the president
data.description: Federal Reserve Board nominee Michael Milan has stated that he does not recommend handing control of the Fed to the president. The Fed in the 1970s failed to raise interest rates enough to keep pace with price increases, and the inflation of the 1970s was caused by both Fed errors and supply shocks. The Fed confused nominal and real interest rates in the 1970s. (Jinshi)

data.title: BlockSpaceForce and Mainnet Capital launch crypto hedge fund, targeting $100 million in assets under management
data.description: Singapore-based BlockSpaceForce has partnered with Mainnet Capital to launch a crypto hedge fund focused on investing in digital asset treasuries (DATs) and other publicly listed crypto-related companies. The fund, with a target asset management scale of $100 million, adopts an open-ended structure and has already invested in DATs such as Kindly MD, Inc. (NAKA), SharpLink Gaming Inc. (SBET), and SUI Group Holdings Ltd. (SUIG). The fund focuses on mainstream digital assets such as Bitcoin, Ethereum, Chainlink, and Solana. Currently, the fund is only open to institutional and accredited investors. (The Block)

data.title: Stripe and Paradigm announce Tempo, a payments-focused blockchain project
data.description: Stripe, a fintech company valued at $91.5 billion, and Paradigm, a cryptocurrency venture capital firm, announced a joint project called Tempo, a layer-1 blockchain built on stablecoins (cryptocurrencies typically pegged to the US dollar) that could compete with Circle's Arc blockchain, as well as Plasma and Stable. (Fortune)

data.description:

data.title: Bitwise Registers Avalanche ETF Trust in Delaware
data.description:
Bitwise registers a Delaware trust for potential Avalanche ETF, marking a key preparatory step.
source: https://coincu.com/360266-bitwise-avalanche-etf-delaware

data.title: Whales inject 5 million USDC into Hyperliquid, leveraging their long positions in HYPE and other assets
data.description: According to on-chain analysis firm Onchain Lens, a whale transferred 5 million USDC to Hyperliquid on September 5th and established a long position in HYPE with 3x leverage. The address also held long positions in ETH (5x), PUMP (3x), and PENGU (3x), and placed orders in HYPE and WLFI to further increase its holdings.

data.title: WLFI blacklisted 272 addresses within a week
data.description: Galaxy researcher Zack wrote that WLFI has blacklisted 272 addresses in the past week, and on-chain data shows that some of them were batch operations.

data.title: Kraken Acquires Crypto-Native Prop Trading Firm Breakout to Expand Digital Asset Strategy
data.description:
The acquisition allows Kraken users to develop strategies across 50+ crypto pairs with up to 5x leverage on BTC and ETH.
source: https://www.nftgators.com/kraken-acquires-crypto-native-prop-trading-firm-breakout-to-expand-digital-asset-strategy/

data.title: Sora, Robot Consulting unveil billion-crypto treasury plans in big Asia push
data.description:
Asia is stepping up its institutional adoption of digital assets, as two major announcements this week highlighted the region’s ambitions to catch up with the West, especially the US, in crypto adoption. At Taipei Blockchain Week, Hong Kong-based Sora Ventures launched Asia’s first Bitcoin treasury fund, backed by $200 million in commitments and aiming to […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/sora-robot-billion-crypto-treasury/

data.title: SharpLink Will Explore Staking Portion of $3.6 Billion Ethereum Treasury on Linea, CEO Says
data.description:
SharpLink Gaming, one of the largest Ethereum treasury firms, plans to explore staking a portion of its $3. 6 billion worth of ETH to the Linea network.
source: https://decrypt.co/337954/sharplink-explore-staking-portion-3-6-billion-ethereum-treasury-linea-ceo
